PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Irene Sorokolit Gregson in Propria Persona.

Ms. Gregson asked if there had been any errors or defects in anything that she has submitted so far. The Court stated that it was not aware of any. Ms. Gregson stated that she expects to meet with an attorney next week but asked if there was a chance that the petition would be approved without one. The Court stated that it does not think it is a good idea to have someone not represented but that if she tells the court she does not intend to move forward with counsel it will take the matter under submission. Ms. Gregson stated that she was not fully prepared at the last hearing, that she has spoken with a paralegal and that she has a better understanding at this time and asked the court if her petition is denied could she then come back with counsel. The Court explained that it would require a new petition and that her options today are that it can stand on what was heard today or continue the matter for her to have an attorney present. Ms. Gregson stated that she does not wish to proceed with an attorney at this time. The Court stated that she could find herself over her head in this but that it is her decision. The Petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Continued To Sep-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Irene Sorokolit Gregson in Propria Persona. Mary Sorokolit also present.

The Court stressed the importance of attorney representation, explained that there are many steps that will need to be taken and that this department encourages legal support. Ms. Gregson stated that she could obtain counsel and described what she thought the necessary steps would be. The Court stated that the steps were not quite as described and continued the matter for Ms. Gregson to obtain counsel. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was continued to September 2, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
